GeneralDescription.SourceString: The imperious god of the sun.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: The imperious god of the sun.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The god of the sun - and medicine, the arts, truth and prophecies, herds and shepherds... Apollo has no time for the squabbling of his fellow immortals, nor Zeus' vendetta against mortalkind, because he's a little busy for all that.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The god of the sun - and medicine, the arts, truth and prophecies, herds and shepherds... Apollo has no time for the squabbling of his fellow immortals, nor Zeus' vendetta against mortalkind, because he's a little busy for all that.
